text.title: Problem Validation 2026 Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Problem Validation 2026. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: recruit-cold
step.action: Recruit ≥6 cold respondents via Reddit/LinkedIn DMs.

step.name: extract-signals
step.action: Tag each commitment/red-flag with tier + citation; emit signal_extraction JSON.

step.name: human-review-ledger
step.action: Human reviewer freezes ledger; fixes mis-tiered rows.

step.name: write-verdict
step.action: In a separate call, draft verdict against r2 floor.

decision-gate.p: After the final step, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
